title: Evil Larry Cat
description: Adds the evil Larry cat from Brainrot. It does not spawn naturally or do anything. May change in the future
body:
This mod adds an Entity resembling Evil Larry from TikTok Brainrot slop. It has 100HP and drops absolutely nothing (yet). It can be spawned with an Spawn egg in Creative mode and through a ritual (kind of like a golem) by placing black concrete in an "o" shape 
###
# #
###
and a carved pumpkin in the middle after. If you hit Larry he will get aggressive at you and hit you for 3650 Damage per hit. This WILL break armor
